description: Gliscor runs Sand Tomb/Sand Attack instead of its standard moveset specifically to cover the flying-type team's weaknesses to electric, steel, and rock types with ground-type damage, while Corviknight provides bulk and payback coverage. The creator highlights Corviknight as having the most potential and being the Pokemon to keep alive, with Gliscor's role being to debuff and soften threats that the backline can't handle.

sources.author: JonkusPKMN
sources.videoTitle: AAA TEAM DOMINANCE?! NEWLY BUFFED *SHADOW* GLISCOR is KEY for this MONO TEAM to Work | Ultra League!

description: The creator explicitly states this is 'basically the strongest possible backline on PVPoke' — the #1 and #2 ranked Pokemon. Corviknight resists charge move damage from opponents while Moltres serves as the closer. Together they form the backbone of the team's backline.

sources.author: JonkusPKMN
sources.videoTitle: AAA TEAM DOMINANCE?! NEWLY BUFFED *SHADOW* GLISCOR is KEY for this MONO TEAM to Work | Ultra League!

description: Skeledirge as safe switch ramps up with Torch Song and forces shields or deals heavy Shadow Ball damage, then Cradily capitalizes on the farm down and energy advantage — referred to as a 'combo play' by the creator.

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: *NEW* Pyro Ball Cinderace hits HARD in the Ultra League | Pokémon GO Battle League

description: Shadow Drapion covers Virizion's fairy weakness, while Virizion covers Drapion's sole ground weakness. Creator explicitly calls this a 'really nice core pairing.'

sources.author: MarckPoGoW
sources.videoTitle: +100 ELO WITH SHADOW DRAPION in the Ultra League! Pokémon Go PvP

description: Creator refers to Ludicolo as a 'core breaker' for these two, implicitly identifying them as a core. Excadrill handles steel/fairy threats and Giratina (nearly two-shots it with Drill Run), while Shadow Latias provides heavy neutral damage with Mist Ball and cleans up weakened opponents.

sources.author: Reis2TheOccasion
sources.videoTitle: MIST BALLIN' with Shadow Latias!! | Pokémon GO Battle League

description: Shadow Malamar is incredibly safe and pairs exceptionally well with Volt Switch Forretress, which the creator calls the best Pokémon in the Ultra League. Malamar handles fighting and psychic threats while Forretress applies constant pressure with Sand Tomb debuffs and Volt Switch damage, shutting down entire teams.

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: I *FINALLY* HAVE ONE! XL Forretress is absolutely BUSTED in the Ultra League this season...

description: Forretress shuts down the Flyers that Shadow Swampert doesn't want to see, while Swampert handles the fire and ground threats Forretress is weak to. Creator explicitly calls Forretress 'an incredibly good core pairing for Shadow Swampert.'

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: The NIGHTMARE returns! *Buffed* Shadow Swampert got its pacing back! | Pokémon GO PvP

description: Shadow Gyarados draws out steel/electric/rock counters like Virizion and Forretress that Gourgeist can hard-counter and fully farm down. Creator explicitly notes Grimmsnarl would 'core break my other two Pokémon' (Gyarados and Gourgeist), confirming they operate as a core. Gourgeist repeatedly sweeps after Gyarados applies early pressure.

sources.author: Reis2TheOccasion
sources.videoTitle: *TWISTER* Shadow Gyarados INSANE Wins!! | Pokémon GO Battle League

description: Double dark-type backline core — once Galarian Wheezing neutralizes the opposing fairy threat on the lead, Guzzlord becomes an effective safe swap since opponents are unlikely to run a second fairy. Guzzlord's bulk absorbs hits while Yveltal buffs its defense with Oblivion Wing, making them very difficult to break through together.

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: The #1 Ultra League Player in the World is DOMINATING with Yveltal! | Pokémon GO Battle League

description: Backline core adapted from the creator's Legend-hitting Dewgong + Galarian Moltres Great League line. Lapras baits out rock/electric types so Galarian Moltres can roam free with Fly and Brave Bird unwalled.

sources.author: MarckPoGoW
sources.videoTitle: TOP TEAMS for the FANTASY CUP and the ULTRA LEAGUE in POKEMON GO!

description: Very solid core — Talonflame resists all of Steelix's weaknesses (fighting, fire, ground) while Steelix's steel typing complements Talonflame's vulnerabilities.
